chunks.title: Event Registry & Configuration
chunks.summary: Admin-configurable multi-event registry with sports, host cities/countries, schedules, participating teams, and activation logic that seeds communities.

chunks.title: User Identity, Onboarding & Roles
chunks.summary: Persistent cross-event Fan Profile, registration via email/phone/OAuth, event activation, and multi-role selection.

chunks.title: Verification Tiers & Trust Signals
chunks.summary: Tiered verification (Basic, Verified Identity, Local Helper, Business) with badges and cross-event reputation score.

chunks.title: Country & City Communities
chunks.summary: Event-scoped country communities nested into city sub-communities and channels, including cross-country affinity communities and community features.

chunks.title: Community Moderation & Content Governance
chunks.summary: Moderator roles, pinned guides, announcements, reporting/blocking, moderation queue with SLAs, auto-moderation, and audit logging.

chunks.title: Messaging & Real-Time Communications
chunks.summary: 1:1 encrypted DMs, group chat, threaded community channels, read-only announcements, match-day live chat, and voice notes with transcription.

chunks.title: In-App Translation & Phrase Cards
chunks.summary: Auto-detect and one-tap non-destructive message translation plus emergency phrase cards via external translation API.

chunks.title: Notifications & Alert Delivery
chunks.summary: Push/SMS/email/in-app notifications for matches, trips, helpers, meetups, announcements, and safety/visa alerts with subscription controls.

chunks.title: Personal & Group Itinerary Planning
chunks.summary: Personal itinerary builder, trip objects, shared group itineraries with coordination chat and voting, calendar/export, and offline access.

chunks.title: Intercity Trip Coordination
chunks.summary: Origin→destination route matching, shared travel groups, route tips, and border/visa reminders for multi-country events.

chunks.title: Local Helper Network
chunks.summary: Helper profiles, offering categories, availability calendar, request/match/accept flow, ratings, and helper economics with paid offerings/commission.

chunks.title: Smart Fan Matching & Discovery
chunks.summary: Automatic fan/helper matching by city/dates/match/route/language with opt-in visibility controls and suggestion/discovery cards.

chunks.title: Official Information & Visa Intelligence
chunks.summary: Per-event/per-city guides, match/schedule feed with timezone conversion, and visa/entry intelligence with official portal links.

chunks.title: Safety Modes, Meetup Safety & SOS
chunks.summary: Meetup check-in/out, trusted contacts, Solo/Women/Family/Accessibility modes, location sharing, and always-visible Emergency SOS.

chunks.title: Business Partner Portal
chunks.summary: Verified business listings, native-language menus, sponsored placement, fan discounts, group booking, and partner categories.

chunks.title: Admin Console & Analytics Dashboard
chunks.summary: Admin event/community/user/trust management plus analytics dashboards for usage, trips, helpers, incidents, and retention.

chunks.title: AI Trip Assistant
chunks.summary: LLM-powered conversational assistant aware of schedule, cities, preferences, helper availability, and itinerary for route/timing suggestions.

chunks.title: Platform Foundation, Security & Compliance
chunks.summary: Cross-cutting multi-region cloud architecture, performance/scalability, security, GDPR/CCPA/PDPA privacy, i18n/RTL, and WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility foundations.
